title: ToolTreaux 10X Jewelers Loupe 25mm Diameter Glass Lens Magnifier Plastic
short_description: The ToolTreaux 10X Magnification Jewelers Loupe in plastic provides simple yet effective magnification designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may obstruct the view of the small items you're working with. This loupe features a 10X magnification power and provides jewelers, watch makers or photographers the ability to pinpoint areas that need extra attention.
narrative: The ToolTreaux 10X Magnification Jewelers Loupe in plastic provides simple yet effective magnification designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may obstruct the view of the small items you're working with. This loupe features a 10X magnification power and provides jewelers, watch makers or photographers the ability to pinpoint areas that need extra attention. The lens has an extra large diameter of 25mm making it an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision. This loupe is housed inside of a durable yet lightweight plastic body, and measures just 1" tall so it can easily fit inside any craft box, hobby tool kit or supply drawer. This is a must-have magnifying tool for anyone who needs a better look at small items and details.

title: ToolTreaux Deluxe Hobby Craft DIY Vinyl Cutting Kit with Self Healing Mat Clamps
short_description: Cut and shape vinyl like a pro with the Deluxe Vinyl Cutting Tool Kit! Make sure to grab this set before your next vinyl cutting project! Hobby Knife Set: 3 Precision Knives with Assorted Blades Sizes for Any Project.
narrative: Cut and shape vinyl like a pro with the Deluxe Vinyl Cutting Tool Kit! This kit comes with everything you need to craft with vinyl: a self healing cutting board, assorted precision hobby blades, scissors, clamps, tweezers and a hook and pick set. The self-healing mat measures 18" x 12" and comes with handy grid-lines for exact measurements. We've included clamps to hold your vinyl down while you work, and the scissors will assist you in cutting larger pieces. Additionally we've included a 4 piece hook and pick set as well as 5 assorted tweezers for added accuracy and easy clean up. Make sure to grab this set before your next vinyl cutting project! 16pc Hobby Knife Set Includes: *(1) Precision Knife w/ 3/8" Chuck & Plastic Grip Handle *(1) Precision Knife w/ 3/8" Chuck & Metal Handle *(1) Precision Knife w/ 1/4" Chuck & Metal Handle *(2) #2 Blades *(1) #7 Blade *(1) #10 Blade *(3) #11 Blades *(1) #12 Blade *(1) #17 Blade *(1) #19 Blade *(1) #20 Blade *(1) #21 Blade *(1) #22 Blade 4pc Pick & Hook Set Includes: *(1) Straight Pick *(1) 30 Degree Hook *(1) Hook *(1) 90 Degree Hook

title: 6" Paracord Wrapped Compact Neck Chain Knife with Sheath (Neon Green) Tactical
short_description: Be prepared for any situation with the Survival Paracord Wrapped Neck Chain Knife! Measuring in at only 6" long, this knife makes for perfect covert protection. Compact and lightweight, the knife comes with a sheath attached to a chain that can be hung around your neck for easy transportation. The bright green color makes it easy to spot. The knife handle is wrapped a highly durable survival paracord, which can be unraveled from the handle at any time in order to assist in an emergency situation. These blades also come with an impact resistant sheath that allows for quick release, so you'll have easy access to your blade at all times.

title: Universal Tool 10X Plastic Jewelers Loupe 25mm Diameter Glass Lens Magnifier
short_description: If you're a jewelry maker or hobby craft enthusiast, you've probably found yourself in a situation where you could use a better look at tiny gems, beads or other materials. With the Universal Tool 10X Magnifier Loupe, you'll be able to do just that! Jeweler's loupes are simple yet effective magnification devices designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes generally have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may mar the view of the small items you're working with.
narrative: If you're a jewelry maker or hobby craft enthusiast, you've probably found yourself in a situation where you could use a better look at tiny gems, beads or other materials. With the Universal Tool 10X Magnifier Loupe, you'll be able to do just that! Jeweler's loupes are simple yet effective magnification devices designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes generally have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may mar the view of the small items you're working with. This loupe features a 10X magnification power, which means it will magnify whatever you're viewing by 10. This is a significant improvement when viewing intricate details, and will help jewelers, watch makers or photographers pinpoint areas that need extra attention. The lens has a diameter of 25mm making it an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision. As stated previously, this loupe is housed inside of a durable yet lightweight plastic body to protect the lens, and measures just 1" tall so it can easily fit inside just about any craft box, hobby tool kit or supply drawer. Keep in mind that loupes are meant to be used with the lens close to the item you're magnifying so that they work properly. In addition to jewelry making, watch repairs and other precision hobby crafts, loupes are great tools for other professions like printing, dentistry, geology, electronics repair and even tattooing! This is a must-have magnifying tool for anyone who needs a better look at small items and details.

title: Universal Tool Chasing and Goldsmith Hammer 1 and 5/8 inch Diameter DIY Crafting
short_description: The 8331JH chasing and goldsmith hammer has two flat faces on each end with one end at 1” diameter and the other at 5/8” diameter. The flat faces are ideal for any crafts including forging or flattening of precious metals, including gold, silver, platinum, and palladium. You can also use these flat faces on a round precious metal surface to even it out. This hammer is great for jewelers, machinists, artisans, metalsmiths, and more. It features a wooden handle for a comfortable grip.

title: ASR Outdoor 38pc Deluxe Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Carry
short_description: If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered! A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material.
narrative: If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered! A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material. Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe. The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has 13 different pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily. Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, jade in Big Sur, California, or fossils in Wyoming, this rockhounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck!
feature_bullets: KIT COMPONENTS INCLUDE: x1 hammer, x1 unisex gloves, x1 aluminum jeweler’s loupe, x1 goggles, x6 cleaning brushes, x1 mini classifier sieve, x1 snifter bottle, x1 carabiner, x6 plastic baggies, x1 tweezers, x1 chisel, x1 set of aluminum containers and x1 nylon tool bag

title: ASR Outdoor 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Bag Shovel Scoop Tools Set
short_description: Whether you’re searching for small bits of history or cash value items like gold coins, jewelry or precious metals, set yourself up for success in the field with ASR Outdoors 18pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit.
narrative: Whether you’re searching for small bits of history or cash value items like gold coins, jewelry or precious metals, set yourself up for success in the field with ASR Outdoors 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit. Suitable For: Beginners, Hobbyists, Professionals Recommended Use: Metal Detecting, Gold Prospecting, Treasure Hunting, Relic Hunting The kit includes the following metal detector accessories:

The best part about this metal detector accessories field kit, is that all included tools fit into the included musette style tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one location.

The included tool bag is built for real field use , featuring a large main compartment for storing finds, plus 13 interior pockets to keep your tools neatly organized. A front-access zipper pouch allows quick access to smaller items like notebooks, maps, or personal gear, while an external loop is designed to hold a handheld pin pointer , keeping it within reach at all times.

This kit also features a multi-functional digging system , including a serrated edge digger, depth trowel, large sand scoop, and a unique 2-in-1 scoop with removable steel probe , allowing you to pinpoint and recover targets more efficiently in both sand and soil conditions.
Additional accessories like gloves, tweezers, loupe, resealable bags, and a waterproof notebook help you handle, inspect, and store your finds with care and precision .
Whether you're just getting started or upgrading your gear, this kit delivers portability, organization, and versatility so you can focus on the thrill of the find.
feature_bullets: COMPLETE 19-PIECE METAL DETECTING KIT : Everything you need to start finding coins, relics, jewelry and gold in one ready-to-go field set
ALL-IN-ONE ORGANIZATION SYSTEM : Durable musette shoulder bag keeps tools organized with 13 pockets and large storage compartment
FAST FIELD ACCESS DESIGN : Dedicated loop holds pin pointer (not included) for quick retrieval while detecting
VERSATILE DIGGING & RECOVERY TOOLS : Includes shovel, serrated digger, sand scoop, probe and trowel for dirt, sand and mixed terrain
SMART MULTI-FUNCTION SCOOP TOOL : 2-in-1 scoop with removable steel probe helps locate and recover targets with precision
IDEAL FOR BEGINNERS & PROS : Perfect starter kit or upgrade set for hobbyists, detectorists, beach hunters and treasure seekers
(1) Musette Style Shoulder Bag

title: Beille 17oz Stoneware Terracotta Coffee Mug Farmhouse Decor Kitchen (4 Colors)
short_description: Bring a touch of natural warmth, organic design and farmhouse decor to any kitchen, with our 17oz stoneware mugs, featuring a terracotta base and smooth, glazed upper. Thoughtfully designed to blend earthy texture with modern simplicity, these coffee mug perfectly balance function and form.
narrative: Bring a touch of natural warmth, organic design and farmhouse decor to any kitchen, with our 17oz stoneware mugs, featuring a terracotta base and smooth, glazed upper. Thoughtfully designed to blend earthy texture with modern simplicity, these coffee mug perfectly balance function and form. Each mug is made from durable stoneware, giving it a solid, comfortable weight in hand while maintaining a refined silhouette that complements any kitchen aesthetic. The un-glazed terracotta base adds a natural contrast and tactile finish, grounding the piece in organic style. The smooth, glazed upper not only provides a sleek look but also ensures that each sip—from hot coffee and herbal tea to cocoa or Matcha—is perfectly enjoyed without lingering stains or residue. Designed for everyday convenience, these mugs are microwave and dishwasher safe, making them as practical as they are beautiful. Their 17 ounce capacity offers the perfect size for generous pours of your favorite hot or cold beverages, whether you’re brewing your first cup in the morning or winding down with tea in the evening. Available in four modern colorways, each mug brings a curated, collected feel to your table or open shelving, inviting you to mix and match for a warm, lived in look. Perfect for home use, at the office, cabin or cottage, or as a thoughtful gift for coffee and tea lovers alike, Beille's terracotta based stoneware mugs are a must have staple that elevates daily rituals, one sip at a time.
PLEASE NOTE: Only (1) mug is included per order unless you order multiple quantities. Select your prefered color for (1) mug via the drop down menu.
feature_bullets: COFFEE MUGS: Crafted with a glossy stoneware upper and matte terracotta base, each mug combines warmth and simplicity; the blend of materials creates a balanced, tactile drinking experience, one that feels both modern and handcrafted, perfect for any kitchen

title: ASR Outdoor 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Backpack Kit Brown
short_description: The Backpack and Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit Combo Set from ASR Outdoor was designed to give you the edge while panning for gold with portability in mind; inside the backpack, we've included our 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box. This lightweight, sluice box for gold panning incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50 inch run out. You can backpack this folding gold sluice box into remote areas anywhere! Simplify your gold prospecting and mining operations with this sluice box backpack gold panning kit. The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar models in that they will often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream. The sluice box features a uni-body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long rust-free service, fitted over grey miners moss and gold carpet which is pre-installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out. Ideal for use in conjunction with ASR Outdoor classifier screens. With our top load canvas backpack you'll be able to carry as much equipment as you need. This 30L hiking day pack has room, even while filled with the sluice box to contain all your outdoor gear; featuring quick release buckles and a draw string closure to keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily accessible in the large central pouch. The two side pouches close securely by zipper and magnetic canvas flap snap.

title: ToolTreaux 14 Karat Gold Testing Kit Acid Solution, Stone Neutralizer Combo
short_description: Easily test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 14K Gold Testing Kit with Testing Stone and Neutralizer Combo! The kit includes one 0.5oz bottle of gold testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone. The included testing solution is potent, effective and will see you through dozens of tests! Housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, giving the tester control over the amount of solution used. GOLD TESTING METHOD: This gold testing method is best used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item.
narrative: Easily test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 14K Gold Testing Kit with Testing Stone and Neutralizer Combo! The kit includes one 0.5oz bottle of gold testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone. The included testing solution is potent, effective and will see you through dozens of tests! Housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, giving the tester control over the amount of solution used. GOLD TESTING METHOD: This gold testing method is best used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item. If testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot, so as not to compromise the finished piece. INSTRUCTIONS: To test gold karat content, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit. Place a small drop of solution on top of the deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher, the solution will not affect the deposit. If the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear. When done, add an equal amount of neutralizing solution to neutralize the old solution. Ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed and neutralized before starting any more testing! PLEASE NOTE: Testing solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Ensure neutralization of the testing solution after every test by using the neutralizing solution. Read the label on the bottle and follow provided instructions.
feature_bullets: GOLD TESTING KIT: Easily test the karat of your gold with ToolTreaux's gold testing solution kits. Kits include one 0.5oz bottle of testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone
GOLD TESTING METHOD: Works on any gold; best used on gold that is yet to be smelted due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item
EASY USE: Comes with guided instructions; simply place a drop of testing solution on your gold sample deposit and instantly see the results
SAFETY FIRT: Included neutralizing solution ensures safe practice and clean up; easily neutralize the harsh chemicals in the testing solution once you are done
WARNING: Keep out of reach of children. Exercise extreme caution when opening and using. Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended. Instruction pamphlet included
